candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus reports green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, treat directional conviction as unvalidated regardless of how high conv% is — only pairs with green_matches>=3 and hist_hr>60% have earned execution weight.
testable_rule: if consensus.green_matches < 3 or consensus.hist_hr < 0.60: veto_entry(pair)  # conv% alone is insufficient
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
